app.close_confirm: Are you sure you want to close the agent? It will no longer be available for remote assistance.
app.quit_sudo_hint: Enter your user password to close the agent.
app.admin_only_hint: This section is restricted to administrators. Run the agent with administrator privileges to access it.

auth.title: Authentication Required
auth.subtitle: Enter your user password to access this section.
auth.settings_subtitle: Enter your current user password for sudo access. The root password is not used here.
auth.sudo_error: Authentication service is not available on this system.

admin_required.title: Administrator rights required
admin_required.message: This section can only be accessed when the agent runs with local administrator privileges.
admin_required.hint: Ask your IT administrator to launch the agent as Administrator, or right-click the installer and choose "Run as administrator".

setup.title: Server Setup
setup.subtitle: Connect this device to a BetterDesk server
setup.lan_discovery_hint: Search BetterDesk servers announced on your LAN and fill the address automatically.
setup.lan_discovery_empty: No BetterDesk servers were discovered automatically. You can still enter the address manually.
setup.complete_message: This device is now connected to the BetterDesk server and ready for remote management.
setup.pending_message: Your device registration has been submitted and is pending approval.
setup.pending_hint: Please ask an administrator to approve this device in the web console → Registrations tab.
setup.approval_rejected: Registration was rejected by the administrator

chat.title: Chat
chat.connection_required: Connection to server required for chat

help.title: Request Help
help.description: Send a help request to an available operator. An operator will connect to assist you.
help.message_placeholder: What do you need help with?
help.sent_message: An operator has been notified. They will connect shortly.
help.active_message: An operator is currently connected to your device.

settings.title: Settings
settings.api_key_hint: Create an API key in the web console under Server → API Keys.
settings.auto_start_sidecar_hint: Start the Go CDAP agent automatically with the app
settings.allow_screen_capture_hint: Operators can view and control this device’s screen
settings.require_consent_hint: A dialog will appear asking for approval before each remote session
settings.allow_terminal_hint: Operators can open a remote shell on this device
settings.allow_file_browser_hint: Operators can browse and transfer files
settings.allow_clipboard_hint: Clipboard content is synced with the operator
settings.unregister_confirm: Unregister this device from the server? You will need to set up the connection again.

consent.title: Screen Access Request
consent.hint: The operator will be able to see your current screen but cannot control your computer unless you also grant input access.
